description: Searches for files matching a glob pattern within a directory tree. If query is empty, returns all files.

query.description: The glob pattern to match files against (e.g., "*.go", "test_*.py"). If empty or not provided, returns all files.

path.description: Directory path to search. Relative paths are resolved from VFS worktree root; absolute paths are resolved from host filesystem root and must be allowed by VFS access rules.

recursive.description: Whether to search recursively in subdirectories. Defaults to true.
